title: The ALPINE-CRISTAL-JWST Survey: Gas-phase abundance gradients of main sequence star-forming galaxies and their kinematics at $4 < z < 6$
comment: 23 pages, 15 figures, 8 tables. Version after addressing referee's comments
summary: We present gas-phase radial metallicity profiles for 20 main-sequence galaxies at $4<z<6$, primarily based on JWST NIRSpec IFU observations obtained as part of the JWST-ALPINE-CRISTAL programme. Our study aims to connect the metallicity gradients of these galaxies with their kinematic properties from [CII]158$μ$m ALMA observations. We map the radial profiles of oxygen abundance using the strong-line method leveraging the rich set of rest-frame optical emission lines. Linear fits to the annular-binned radial profiles show that, on average, the metallicity gradients are slightly positive with a median of $+0.039 \pm 0.010{\rm dexkpc^{-1}}$. There are no substantial systematic offsets in gradients when using different line diagnostics. However, only three galaxies show a gradient $>0.05{\rm dexkpc^{-1}}$ at $1σ$, and none have a significant negative gradient. We investigate the correlation between the metallicity gradients and the intrinsic gas velocity dispersion $σ_0$, as well as the ratio $V_{\rm rot}/σ_0$ of the disks. Combining our sample with mass-matched literature samples at $3<z<7$, we find a negative shallow correlation between $V_{\rm rot}/σ_0$ and the metallicity gradients, but no strong relationships with $σ_0$. As $V_{\rm rot}/σ_0$ increases towards later cosmic times, the observed negative trend with $V_{\rm rot}/σ_0$ is consistent with the overall cosmic evolution of metallicity gradients from high to low redshifts. This suggests that disk maturity plays a crucial role in shaping the radial metallicity gradients. [Abridged abstract]

AI.tldr: JWST观测显示4<z<6星系金属丰度梯度平均为正，与盘成熟度相关
AI.motivation: 研究高红移星系金属丰度梯度与运动学性质的关系，探索盘成熟度对金属丰度分布的影响
AI.method: 使用JWST NIRSpec IFU观测20个4<z<6星系，通过强线法绘制氧丰度径向分布，结合ALMA [CII]观测的运动学数据，分析梯度与速度弥散、旋转速度的关系
AI.result: 金属丰度梯度平均为正（中值+0.039±0.010 dex/kpc），仅3个星系梯度>0.05 dex/kpc，无显著负梯度；发现V_rot/σ_0与梯度呈负相关，与σ_0无强关系
AI.conclusion: 金属丰度梯度与盘成熟度相关，V_rot/σ_0增加导致梯度变负，这与从高红移到低红移的宇宙演化趋势一致

recommendation.reason: 该论文与用户Zotero兴趣画像高度吻合：研究主题为高红移主序星系的金属丰度梯度与运动学性质，属于强引力透镜领域用户明确优先关注的高红移星系动力学/运动学方向；核心作者包括daizhong liu、jianhang chen、natascha m förster schreiber、reinhard genzel、hannah übler等用户高频作者；方法上使用JWST NIRSpec IFU和ALMA [CII]观测，与用户常用数据手段一致；论文聚焦于盘成熟度对金属丰度梯度的影响，与用户兴趣中的'cosmic noon'、'main-sequence galaxy'、'gas kinematics'等关键词直接匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 极高：论文研究4<z<6主序星系的金属丰度梯度与运动学，完全落在用户优先关注的高红移星系动力学/运动学方向，且与用户关键词'cosmic noon'、'main-sequence galaxy'、'velocity dispersion'等高度一致。
recommendation.method_fit: 极高：使用JWST NIRSpec IFU和ALMA [CII]观测，与用户常用数据手段（JWST、ALMA）完全匹配，且方法涉及强线法氧丰度测量和运动学分析，与用户兴趣中的'gas kinematics'、'dense gas'等直接相关。
recommendation.author_fit: 极高：论文作者中包含多位用户核心作者（daizhong liu、jianhang chen、natascha m förster schreiber、reinhard genzel、hannah übler、lilian l lee、dieter lutz、alvio renzini等），匹配度极高。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 高：论文首次系统研究4<z<6主序星系的金属丰度梯度与运动学关系，发现梯度与盘成熟度（V_rot/σ_0）的负相关，为高红移星系化学演化提供新见解，与用户兴趣中的前沿方向一致。
recommendation.negative_reason: 无：论文不涉及用户明确排除的恒星物理、纯宇宙学、粒子物理、中微子物理或太阳系研究。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了20个主序星系在$4<z<6$范围内的气体相位径向金属丰度分布，主要基于作为JWST-ALPINE-CRISTAL计划一部分的JWST NIRSpec IFU观测数据。本研究旨在将这些星系的金属丰度梯度与其来自[CII]158$\mu$m ALMA观测的运动学特性联系起来。我们利用丰富的静止光学发射线，通过强线方法绘制了氧丰度的径向分布图。对环状分箱径向分布的线性拟合显示，平均而言，金属丰度梯度略为正，中位数为$+0.039 \pm 0.010{\rm dexkpc^{-1}}$。使用不同的线诊断方法时，梯度没有显著的系统性偏移。然而，只有三个星系在$1\sigma$水平上显示出$>0.05{\rm dexkpc^{-1}}$的梯度，且没有一个星系具有显著的负梯度。我们研究了金属丰度梯度与固有气体速度弥散$\sigma_0$以及盘面旋转速度与速度弥散之比$V_{\rm rot}/\sigma_0$之间的相关性。将我们的样本与$3<z<7$范围内质量匹配的文献样本相结合，我们发现$V_{\rm rot}/\sigma_0$与金属丰度梯度之间存在微弱的负相关，但与$\sigma_0$没有强相关性。随着$V_{\rm rot}/\sigma_0$在更晚的宇宙时间增加，观测到的与$V_{\rm rot}/\sigma_0$的负相关趋势与金属丰度梯度从高红移到低红移的整体宇宙演化一致。这表明盘面成熟度在塑造径向金属丰度梯度中起着关键作用。[摘要删节]
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，金属丰度梯度与盘成熟度相关，V_rot/σ_0增加导致梯度变负，这与从高红移到低红移的宇宙演化趋势一致。

The radius of the corresponding annulus is indicated in physical units on the right. The lines used for inferring metallicity in Sect. 4 are annotated at the top. Right : Shape of the annuli shown overlaid on the line flux map of H \({\alpha}\) . The PSF after PSF homogenisation is shown at the bottom left.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：每个环对应的CRISTAL-11 (\(z=4.439\))光谱拟合示例。光谱的拟合过程在第3节中描述。相应环的半径以物理单位标注在右侧。用于在第4节推断金属丰度的谱线标注在顶部。右图：叠加在H \({\alpha}\)线通量图上的环形状。点扩散函数均匀化后的点扩散函数显示在左下角。

figures.caption_zh: 表3：使用多条强线推断的CRISTAL样本的金属丰度梯度。 7 7 7

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Radial profiles of metallicities and their best-fit linear models (black lines) for CRISTAL-01a to 04a. Left : Azimuthally averaged profiles for each galaxy. Dark green pentagons with black outlines represent the metallicities derived by combining the listed line diagnostics using a Bayesian approach (Method I). The translucent grey lines are 300 random draws from the posterior distribution of the model parameters. The outermost radius at which each diagnostic is used is annotated at the corresponding location on the profile. The fainter coloured diamonds represent the metallicities obtained from individual diagnostics via Method II, while the lines in the corresponding colours show the best-fit models for each diagnostic. Right : Pixel-based metallicity profile. Each data point is coloured coded by its (absolute) acute azimuthal angle difference from the major axis. Line diagnostics of which only two annuli are available are shown (coloured diamonds) but not fitted. The profiles for the full samples are shown in Appendix C .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：CRISTAL-01a至04a的金属丰度径向分布及其最佳拟合线性模型（黑线）。左图：每个星系的方位角平均分布。带有黑色轮廓的深绿色五边形代表通过贝叶斯方法（方法I）结合所列线诊断方法得出的金属丰度。半透明灰色线条是来自模型参数后验分布的300次随机抽取。每个诊断方法使用的最外层半径在分布上的相应位置标注。较浅颜色的菱形代表通过方法II从单个诊断方法获得的金属丰度，而相应颜色的线条显示了每个诊断方法的最佳拟合模型。右图：基于像素的金属丰度分布。每个数据点根据其与主轴的（绝对）锐方位角差进行颜色编码。仅有两个环可用的线诊断方法以彩色菱形显示，但未进行拟合。完整样本的分布见附录C。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Distributions of metallicity gradients, \(\nabla_{r}\log({Z})\) as a function of the velocity dispersion, \(\sigma_{0}\) ( left ), and the ratio of rotational velocity to velocity dispersion, \(V_{rot}/\sigma_{0}\) ( right ), for the CRISTAL disk galaxies (green hexagons). We also show \(M_{\star}\) -matched literature samples at \(3\) \(\lesssim\) \(z\) \(\lesssim 7\) as red hexagons, and \(z\) \( 8 . The Kendall’s \(\tau\) correlation coefficients and the \(p\) -values are annotated in the top left in each panel. Histograms of the distributions of the \(3\) \(\lesssim\) \(z\) \(\lesssim 7\) and \(z\) \( (Sen, 1968 ) , included solely to guide the eye; it is not used in any statistical tests. In contrast, the Kendall’s correlation test reveals no significant correlation with \(\sigma_{0}\) , which could be due to the inherently shallow trend and the large scatter. However, comparing the overall distribution of the two populations at \(z\) \( Ma et al. 2017 (purple contour), FIRE2 at \(z\) \(=\) \(3\) from Sun et al. 2025 ( right , open purple pentagons), and TNG50 at \(z\) \(=\) \(3\) from Hemler et al. 2021 ( right , dashed orange line). While the simulations capture the slight positive and negative relationships between \(\nabla_{r}\log({Z})\) and \(\sigma_{0}\) and \(V_{rot}/\sigma_{0}\) , respectively, the normalisation and steepness of these relationships differ from the observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：CRISTAL盘状星系（绿色六边形）的金属丰度梯度\(\nabla_{r}\log({Z})\)作为速度弥散\(\sigma_{0}\)（左图）和旋转速度与速度弥散之比\(V_{rot}/\sigma_{0}\)（右图）的函数分布。我们还展示了在\(3\) \(\lesssim\) \(z\) \(\lesssim 7\)范围内的\(M_{\star}\)匹配文献样本（红色六边形），以及\(z\) \( 8 \)的样本（蓝色六边形）。每个面板左上角标注了Kendall的\(\tau\)相关系数和\(p\)值。\(3\) \(\lesssim\) \(z\) \(\lesssim 7\)和\(z\) \( (Sen, 1968 ) \)的分布直方图，仅用于视觉引导；未用于任何统计检验。相比之下，Kendall相关检验显示与\(\sigma_{0}\)没有显著相关性，这可能是由于固有的浅趋势和大离散度。然而，比较\(z\) \( Ma等人2017（紫色轮廓），\(z\) \(=\) \(3\)的FIRE2来自Sun等人2025（右图，空心紫色五边形），以及\(z\) \(=\) \(3\)的TNG50来自Hemler等人2021（右图，橙色虚线）。虽然模拟捕捉到了\(\nabla_{r}\log({Z})\)分别与\(\sigma_{0}\)和\(V_{rot}/\sigma_{0}\)之间的轻微正相关和负相关关系，但这些关系的归一化和陡峭程度与观测结果不同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Metallicity gradients in disk and non-disk subsets of our sample ( top ) and compiled stellar mass-matched sample from literature at \(3 middle ) and \(1 bottom ). The median values of the distributions are indicated by the vertical dashed line of the corresponding colours, and the errors of the median (obtained by bootstrapping) are represented by the horizontal error bars of the same colour. The literature references are listed in Table 8 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：我们样本中盘状和非盘状子集的金属丰度梯度（顶部），以及来自文献的\(3 middle \)和\(1 bottom \)范围内编译的恒星质量匹配样本。分布的中位数由相应颜色的垂直虚线表示，中位数的误差（通过自助法获得）由相同颜色的水平误差棒表示。文献参考文献列于表8。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Metallicity gradients inferred in three azimuthal bins: \([0^{\circ},30^{\circ})\) (blue), \([30^{\circ},60^{\circ})\) (yellow), and \([60^{\circ},90^{\circ})\) (red). The galaxy IDs are sorted from left to right by their azimuthal variations in terms of standard deviation.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：在三个方位角区间内推断的金属丰度梯度：\([0^{\circ},30^{\circ})\)（蓝色）、\([30^{\circ},60^{\circ})\)（黄色）和\([60^{\circ},90^{\circ})\)（红色）。星系ID从左到右按其方位角变化的标准差排序。

title: Molecular gas and star formation in GASP jellyfish galaxies
comment: 14 pages, 10 figures, Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: Several studies have reported a nearly linear correlation between the molecular gas and star formation rate surface density, the so-called Kennicutt-Schmidt (KS) law. We aim to retrieve the KS relation for a sample of four star-forming galaxies located in nearby clusters, disturbed by the effects of the ram pressure stripping, as testing this law in galaxies subject to different environmental conditions can provide key information on the physics of star formation. To perform our analysis, we used ALMA band 6 and band 3 data coupled with MUSE data at spatial resolution of ~1 kpc. Moreover, we analyzed data of star-forming complexes detected through their Hαionized gas emission. We also derived the star formation efficiencies of the star-forming regions nested in these big complexes using the star formation rates derived from spatially resolved HST images and various recipes for the corresponding cold gas phase. We find that ram-pressure-stripped galaxies show normal-to-low star formation efficiencies, depending on the position within the galaxy and on the local gas density: the inner dense regions in the disk show higher efficiencies with respect to the outer regions, including the gaseous tails. The global relation between the star formation rate density and the molecular gas surface density is superlinear, likely suggesting the shortening of the depletion times at high gas mass densities caused by the ram pressure. Within the star-forming complexes, the star formation efficiency is very similar to the one observed at 1 kpc scale in undisturbed star-forming disks. Interestingly, this result holds also for the star-forming complexes located in the stripped gas tails. The analysis of HST resolved clumps suggests that the molecular gas is not uniformly distributed within the star-forming complexes, but its density distribution follows a steeper profile.

AI.tldr: 研究发现在受冲压剥离影响的星系中，恒星形成效率呈现正常到偏低水平，内盘区域效率较高，而外盘和气体尾迹区域效率较低。分子气体与恒星形成率的关系呈现超线性特征，表明冲压剥离导致高气体密度区域的消耗时间缩短。
AI.motivation: 通过研究受冲压剥离影响的星系中的Kennicutt-Schmidt关系，可以了解不同环境条件下恒星形成的物理机制，特别是冲压剥离如何影响星系中的气体分布和恒星形成效率。
AI.method: 使用ALMA波段6和波段3数据结合MUSE数据，空间分辨率约1千秒差距。分析通过Hα电离气体发射检测到的恒星形成复合体，并利用HST空间分辨图像和各种冷气体相配方推导恒星形成区域的恒星形成效率。
AI.result: 冲压剥离星系显示正常到偏低的恒星形成效率，具体取决于星系内位置和局部气体密度：盘内密集区域效率高于外盘区域（包括气体尾迹）。恒星形成率密度与分子气体表面密度之间的全局关系呈超线性，表明冲压剥离导致高气体质量密度区域的消耗时间缩短。在恒星形成复合体内，恒星形成效率与未受干扰恒星形成盘中1千秒差距尺度观测到的效率非常相似，这一结果在剥离气体尾迹中的恒星形成复合体中也成立。
AI.conclusion: 冲压剥离影响下的星系中，恒星形成效率呈现空间异质性，内盘效率较高而外盘和尾迹效率较低。分子气体在恒星形成复合体内分布不均匀，密度分布呈现更陡峭的轮廓。尽管受到环境扰动，恒星形成复合体仍能维持与未受干扰星系相似的局部恒星形成效率。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究近邻星系团中受冲压剥离影响的星系中的分子气体与恒星形成关系，属于星系环境演化领域。用户的核心兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学与多相气体，而本文研究对象为近邻星系（非高红移），且完全不涉及引力透镜。虽然涉及分子气体和恒星形成，但缺乏高红移、透镜或核心作者等关键匹配点。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低度匹配。论文主题为近邻星系团中的冲压剥离与恒星形成，用户兴趣集中于高红移强引力透镜星系，两者在红移范围、科学问题和方法上差异显著。
recommendation.method_fit: 低度匹配。论文使用ALMA和MUSE进行~1 kpc分辨率的观测，用户常用方法包括强引力透镜建模、高分辨率光谱（如JWST、ALMA）研究高红移星系，但本文未涉及透镜技术。
recommendation.author_fit: 无匹配。论文作者均不在用户的核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等。论文检验了极端环境下KS关系的普适性，有一定新颖性，但与用户兴趣领域关联弱。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文研究近邻星系（低红移），不涉及引力透镜，且未聚焦于高红移星系动力学或多相气体，与用户主要兴趣方向偏离较大。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 多项研究报告了分子气体与恒星形成率面密度之间近乎线性的相关性，即所谓的肯尼卡特-施密特定律。我们旨在为四个位于邻近星系团中、受到冲压剥离效应扰动的恒星形成星系样本获取KS关系，因为在不同环境条件下检验这一定律可以为恒星形成物理提供关键信息。为进行分析，我们使用了ALMA的6波段和3波段数据，结合空间分辨率约为1 kpc的MUSE数据。此外，我们分析了通过其Hα电离气体发射探测到的恒星形成复合体的数据。我们还利用从空间分辨的HST图像导出的恒星形成率以及相应的冷气体相的各种配方，推导出嵌套在这些大复合体中的恒星形成区域的恒星形成效率。我们发现，受到冲压剥离的星系显示出正常到较低的恒星形成效率，这取决于星系内的位置和局部气体密度：盘内致密区域相对于外部区域（包括气体尾迹）显示出更高的效率。恒星形成率密度与分子气体面密度之间的全局关系是超线性的，这可能表明冲压压力导致高气体质量密度下的消耗时间缩短。在恒星形成复合体内，恒星形成效率与在未受干扰的恒星形成盘中1 kpc尺度上观测到的非常相似。有趣的是，这一结果也适用于位于剥离气体尾迹中的恒星形成复合体。对HST分辨团块的分析表明，分子气体在恒星形成复合体内并非均匀分布，其密度分布遵循更陡峭的轮廓。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：冲压剥离影响下的星系中，恒星形成效率呈现空间异质性，内盘效率较高而外盘和尾迹效率较低。分子气体在恒星形成复合体内分布不均匀，密度分布呈现更陡峭的轮廓。尽管受到环境扰动，恒星形成复合体仍能维持与未受干扰星系相似的局部恒星形成效率。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Target galaxies’ properties. 1 1 1 Coordinates, host cluster, distance from the BCG, stellar mass, redshift, total SFR, and disk SFR for the four target galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：目标星系的属性。1 1 1 四个目标星系的坐标、宿主星系团、与最亮星系团星系的距离、恒星质量、红移、总恒星形成率和盘恒星形成率。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Properties of the CO(1-0) and CO(2-1) line images. 2 2 2 Observed frequency, synthesized beam, channel rms of the 20 \(km\,s^{-1}\) velocity resolution cubes, and MRS.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：CO(1-0)和CO(2-1)谱线图像的属性。2 2 2 观测频率、合成波束、20 \(km\,s^{-1}\) 速度分辨率立方体的通道均方根以及MRS。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: CO(2-1) and CO(1-0) zero-moment maps for JO201, JO204, JO206, and JW100. The red contour shows the extent of the stellar disk, as defined in Gullieuszik et al. ( 2020 ) . The beam size is the orange ellipse in the lower left corner of each map. Colored contours delineate the H \(\alpha\) emission derived from MUSE data.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：JO201、JO204、JO206和JW100的CO(2-1)和CO(1-0)零阶矩图。红色轮廓线显示了恒星盘的延伸范围，如Gullieuszik等人（2020）所定义。波束大小是每张图左下角的橙色椭圆。彩色轮廓线描绘了从MUSE数据导出的H \(\alpha\) 发射。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Distribution of the CO(2-1) derived molecular gas mass surface densities using the MW \(\alpha_{CO}\) (continuous black histogram) and a varying \(\alpha_{CO}\) that follows the stellar mass density distribution (dashed blue histogram), using the relation given in Sandstrom et al. 2013 . The vertical dashed and continuous red lines show the average density at the galaxy centers, estimated over the central \(\simeq\) 1 kpc 2 , assuming the variable \(\alpha_{CO}\) and the MW \(\alpha_{CO}\) , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：使用银河系 \(\alpha_{CO}\)（连续黑色直方图）和遵循恒星质量密度分布的变化 \(\alpha_{CO}\)（虚线蓝色直方图，使用Sandstrom等人2013给出的关系）导出的CO(2-1)分子气体质量面密度分布。垂直虚线和连续红线显示了星系中心的平均密度，估计在中心 \(\simeq\) 1 kpc 2 范围内，分别假设了变化的 \(\alpha_{CO}\) 和银河系 \(\alpha_{CO}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Star formation rate density as a function of the \(H_{2}\) surface mass density from the CO(2-1) measured on 1 kpc scale for the GASP galaxies JO201, JO204, JO206, and JW100 (from top left to bottom right). The shaded region encompasses the zone with depletion times between 0.1 and 10 Gyr. The continuous black line is the fit to the disk regions (in black) that takes into account errors on both coordinates, the dashed blue line is the local relation on 1 kpc scale from Bigiel et al. ( 2011 ) , and the dashed green line was derived for VERTICO galaxies on a 1.2 kpc scale from Jiménez-Donaire et al. ( 2023 ) . The red squares show the measurements corresponding to the tails.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对于GASP星系JO201、JO204、JO206和JW100（从左上到右下），在1 kpc尺度上从CO(2-1)测量的恒星形成率密度作为 \(H_{2}\) 表面质量密度的函数。阴影区域涵盖了消耗时间在0.1到10 Gyr之间的区域。连续黑线是对盘区域（黑色）的拟合，考虑了坐标上的误差；虚线蓝线是Bigiel等人（2011）在1 kpc尺度上的局部关系；虚线绿线是Jiménez-Donaire等人（2023）在1.2 kpc尺度上为VERTICO星系导出的关系。红色方块显示了对应于尾迹的测量值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: As in Fig. 3 but for the CO(1-0) emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图3相同，但针对CO(1-0)发射。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: KS relation slope and intercept for the disk spaxels in our galaxies, derived from the CO(2-1) and the CO(1-0) data.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：从CO(2-1)和CO(1-0)数据导出的我们星系盘空间像素的KS关系斜率和截距。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Depletion time maps for the four jellyfish galaxies JO201 (top left), JO204 (top right), JW100 (middle right left), and JO206 (bottom). The gray background layer shows the extent of the H \(\alpha\) emission from MUSE.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：四个水母星系JO201（左上）、JO204（右上）、JW100（中右左）和JO206（底部）的消耗时间图。灰色背景层显示了来自MUSE的H \(\alpha\) 发射的范围。
